headline: After Plunging 18.9% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for Conagra Brands (CAG)
summary: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for Conagra Brands (CAG) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.
